description: Participants build text-to-SVG generation models that convert textual prompts into scalable vector graphics. The competition bridges natural language processing and image synthesis, leveraging diffusion models and differentiable rendering to produce precise, concept-aligned drawings. Success is measured by a custom evaluation metric called SVG Image Fidelity, which quantifies how closely the generated vectors match the target concepts. Competitors package and submit their models as Kaggle Packages for automated testing.
